svg.title: Gymlocator.in SEO Information Architecture
svg.desc: Three-tier SEO architecture showing URL structure, keyword targets, and schema markup for Gymlocator.in

g.text: gym finder India · WebSite + SearchAction schema

svg.text: Homepage: "gym finder India", "best gyms in India"
City: "best gyms in Bangalore", "gyms in Mumbai"
Gym page: "[Gym Name] fees, timings, reviews"
Amenity: "CrossFit gyms in Bangalore", "women-only gyms Delhi"
Blog: "best gyms in Bangalore 2025", "gym membership cost India"
